final:
module RefModule(
    input signed [15:0] in1,
    input signed [15:0] in2,
    input clk,
    output signed [16:0] out
);reg signed [16:0] sum;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    sum <= in1 + in2;
end

assign out = sum[16] ? {1'b1, sum[15:0]} : sum[15:0];

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
